presentation.title: ABOUT US
presentation.text1_short: Technology services company founded on July 1, 2026, specializing in digital and energy transformation in West Africa.
presentation.text1: Founded on July 1, 2026 and based in Abidjan, in the municipality of Cocody, BCA Technologies Limited is a technology services company specializing in digital and energy transformation in West Africa.
presentation.text2: Created under the leadership of its founder, Mr. Georges Poiret Angahi, a telecommunications engineer with over twenty (20) years of experience in the telecommunications, infrastructure, and new technology sectors, the company puts its expertise at the service of businesses, administrations, and local authorities by offering innovative, reliable solutions adapted to the realities of the African continent.
presentation.text3: Resolutely focused on service delivery, BCA Technologies Limited operates in four areas of excellence: fiber optics (design, deployment, connection, maintenance, and operation of very high-speed telecommunications infrastructure); electronic security and building automation (integration of video surveillance, access control, intrusion detection, and intelligent building management solutions); solar energy (study, supply, installation, and maintenance of photovoltaic systems for a sustainable energy transition); and Smart Agriculture — development and integration of connected solutions to optimize agricultural performance through digital technologies, IoT, and automation.
presentation.text4: BCA Technologies Limited's strength also lies in its membership in a solidly structured international group. The company benefits from the strategic support of its parent company, BCA Multiservices Inc., based in Sorel-Tracy, Quebec (Canada). As the group's purchasing hub, it consolidates supplies for all subsidiaries to negotiate the best commercial conditions with manufacturers, thereby guaranteeing quality equipment at competitive prices.
presentation.text5: BCA Technologies Limited works alongside two complementary sister companies: BCA Business Canada Africa Import & Export, based in Abidjan, specializing in the supply of telecommunications, IT, and electronic equipment and technology solutions; and Best Africa Limited, established in Mali since 2018, specializing in the deployment and maintenance of fiber optic networks.
presentation.text6: Thanks to this international synergy and a team driven by a strong culture of innovation, BCA Technologies Limited aims to become a reference player in digital and energy transformation in West Africa, contributing to the development of modern, sustainable infrastructure that creates value for its partners and clients.
presentation.mission_text: To provide innovative and reliable technology solutions that foster digital development in Africa, bringing international-quality equipment accessible to local businesses.
presentation.vision_text: To become the reference technology partner in sub-Saharan Africa, connecting African businesses to the world's best technologies while developing local talent.
presentation.values_text: Excellence · Innovation · Integrity · Proximity · Commitment. These five pillars guide every decision and relationship with our clients, partners and collaborators.

activites.page_subtitle: A broad spectrum of technology expertise serving African businesses.
activites.telecom_desc: Supply, installation, and maintenance of high-performance telecom networks.
activites.telecom_long: BCA Technologies Limited designs, deploys, and maintains very high-speed telecommunications infrastructure tailored to the needs of businesses, operators, and institutions. Specializing in fiber optics (FTTH, FTTB, FTTC, FTTN, GPON), we handle the complete network design — from civil works to turnkey delivery — including OTDR testing, splicing, and voice, video & data connectivity management.
activites.it_desc: State-of-the-art IT equipment and electronic solutions for your infrastructure.
activites.it_long: We supply IT and electronic equipment from leading brands (Dell, HP, Cisco, Huawei, Samsung) tailored to professional infrastructure. Our team also handles the deployment, configuration, and maintenance of your IT assets, ensuring optimal performance and enhanced security for your data and systems.
activites.security_desc: Complete protection for your premises and assets.
activites.security_long: BCA Technologies Limited integrates comprehensive electronic security solutions to protect your premises, assets, and data. From IP video surveillance to biometric access control, alarm systems, and intrusion detection, we design custom systems that are robust, scalable, and compliant with international standards.
activites.domotique_desc: Smart automation for residential and commercial buildings.
activites.domotique_long: We automate building management using the latest BMS (Building Management System) and home automation solutions. Smart lighting control, intelligent HVAC, energy management, and integrated security — your facilities become more efficient, comfortable, and energy-efficient, all controllable remotely via smartphone or tablet.
activites.energy_desc: Study, supply, installation, and maintenance of photovoltaic systems for individuals, businesses, and communities.
activites.energy_long: BCA Technologies Limited provides complete solar energy solutions to ensure autonomous and sustainable power supply for your installations. From feasibility studies to installation and maintenance of photovoltaic systems, we support individuals, businesses, and communities in their energy transition — across Côte d'Ivoire and throughout West Africa. Our solutions also include solar surveillance towers for remote areas.

telecom.title: Your fiber network, designed with precision, deployed with excellence
telecom.tagline: Your fiber network, designed with precision, deployed with excellence

subSections.title: Expertise & Engineering
items: Civil engineering studies and works: Site analysis and infrastructure preparation.
Design & Implementation: Complete project management of your connectivity projects.
Network Architecture: Design of reliable and transparent solutions for next-generation voice, video, and data service deployment.

subSections.title: Deployment & Infrastructure
items: Metropolitan Networks and Backbones: Large-scale deployment of structural fiber optic networks.
FTTx Solutions: Implementation of faster and more reliable networks (FTTH, FTTB, FTTC, FTTN).
GPON & POL Technologies: Creation of Passive Optical LAN networks for optimal performance.
Hybrid Infrastructures: Integration of fiber, xDSL, or mixed architectures to reach millions of homes.

subSections.title: Maintenance & Performance
items: Preventive and Corrective Maintenance: Rigorous monitoring of optical transport networks to ensure maximum availability.
High-Precision Testing and Measurement: Use of EXFO equipment for intelligent, automated, and field-tested solutions.
Quality Optimization: Guarantee of a high quality level for all your transport and distribution infrastructures.

it.title: Your security, our commitment
it.tagline: Professional security solutions — Electronic Security Expertise

subSections.title: Intelligent Video Surveillance (CCTV)
items: Installation of high-definition IP cameras (4K) with integrated video analytics.
Line crossing detection, abandoned object detection, and facial recognition.
Hybrid storage solutions (local NVR and secure Cloud).

subSections.title: High-Security Access Control
items: Biometric readers (fingerprints, palm or facial recognition).
RFID badge access management and smartphone unlocking solutions.
Centralized multi-site management for businesses and industrial complexes.

subSections.title: Alarm Systems and Intrusion Detection
items: Connected alarm panels with immediate video verification.
Perimeter sensors, dual-technology motion detectors, and infrared barriers.
Anti-assault systems and silent panic buttons.

subSections.title: Fire Safety and Technical Risks
items: Installation of certified smoke, heat, and carbon monoxide detectors.
System interlocking (automatic emergency exit opening, gas shutdown).
Preventive maintenance to ensure compliance with safety standards.

security.title: Connect, automate, control your environment
security.tagline: Smart and connected technologies — Intelligent Convergence Solutions

subSections.title: IoT Ecosystems (Internet of Things)
items: Integration and interconnection of smart sensors for automated management of your infrastructure.
Smart Building & Office: Transforming workspaces into connected environments to optimize productivity and reduce operational costs.
Unified Networks: Convergence of voice, data, and video streams onto a single, robust, and secure network infrastructure.
Connected Energy Management: Deployment of smart meters and monitoring systems for real-time control of your energy footprint.

subSections.title: User Interfaces and Experience
items: Centralized Dashboards: Global visualization of your systems' status (security, network, energy) on a single ergonomic interface.
Remote Control & Mobility: Full access to your facilities via secure mobile applications, wherever you are in the world.
Predictive Automation: Use of artificial intelligence to anticipate building needs (air conditioning, preventive maintenance).

subSections.title: High-Value-Added Services
items: Connectivity Audit: Analysis of your existing installations to identify modernization and technological optimization levers.
Deployment Engineering: End-to-end support, from feasibility study to commissioning of your connected solutions.
Technical Support & Managed Services: Proactive assistance to ensure service continuity for your smart technologies.

domotique.title: Technology serving your land
domotique.tagline: Smart Agriculture — Precision equipment controllable from a computer or smartphone
domotique.description: BCA Technologies supports agricultural producers and agro-industry with precision equipment controllable from a computer or smartphone:

subSections.title: 5-layer soil temperature and humidity sensors
items: Precise and continuous measurement of the water status of your plots at different depths.

subSections.title: Professional weather station
items: Real-time collection of local climate data to anticipate your crops' needs and adapt your interventions.

subSections.title: Optimal irrigation assisted by computer and smartphone
items: Automatic and intelligent irrigation control through cross-analysis of soil and weather data, to save water and maximize yields.

about.ceo_p1: Since the creation of BCA Multiservices Inc. in 2016, our ambition has always been the same: to actively contribute to Africa's digital transformation by bringing world-class technology solutions adapted to the continent's realities and needs.
about.ceo_p2: We chose not to simply distribute equipment, but to offer a turnkey solution and support our clients over the long term — from design to implementation, through to maintenance and the evolution of their infrastructures. This added value is what sets us apart and explains our 85% client renewal rate.
about.ceo_p3: Our vision for the coming years: strengthen our sub-regional presence, invest in training local talent, and continue innovating in our service delivery to position BCA Technologies as the reference technology partner in sub-Saharan Africa.
about.ceo_p4: I thank our entire team, our partners, and our clients for their trust, which allows us every day to take on new challenges with passion and commitment.
